steps.t: The first Overseer is at the worksite near the western gate of Galtrev. You should carry the first shipment to the Overseer.
The second Overseer is at the worksite slightly up the hill from the first. You should carry the first shipment to the second Overseer.
The third Overseer is at the worksite just uphill and to the south from the second worksite. You should carry the first shipment to the third Overseer…
Ruthless Tom guards the west gate. You should carry the shipment to Ruthless Tom.
Gethin can be found recovering from a long day's work near the fourth worksite. You should return to Gethin and tell him that all of the boxes have be…
